items.title: Stock fundamentals API is available
items.description: The backend exposes a stock fundamentals payload that reads fundamental_feature_daily with snapshot-bound as-of semantics.

items.title: Workbench displays a financial-side panel
items.description: The frontend reads the fundamentals payload and renders a financial-side panel in stock detail.

items.title: Default fixture chain keeps empty-but-valid financial payload semantics
items.description: When canonical financial sidecars are absent in the default fixture provider, the API returns an empty but valid payload instead of placeholder fake financial rows.
